name: LLooM Community Host Seed Recipes
summary: Seed catalog for the local LLooM development community host.

recipes.name: Apple Silicon Qwen3.6 35B-A3B OptiQ (official)
recipes.summary: Official-faithful Qwen3.6-35B-A3B via mlx-community OptiQ mixed 4/8-bit + mlx_lm.server (no MTPLX Speed fork).
recommendedFor: M-series Macs with at least 48 GB unified memory
agentic chat/coding that should match stock Qwen3.6 behavior
users who hit thought-loops or memory thrash on MTPLX Speed FP16

recipes.name: Apple Silicon Qwen3.6 35B-A3B MTPLX
recipes.summary: High-memory Apple Silicon Qwen3.6 MoE lane using MTPLX with 262K context.
recommendedFor: M-series Macs with at least 80 GB unified memory
agentic coding workloads where the fastest observed Qwen3.6 lane matters

recipes.name: Apple Silicon Qwen3.6 27B MTPLX
recipes.summary: Dense Qwen3.6 27B MTPLX lane for Apple Silicon machines that need lower memory pressure.
recommendedFor: M-series Macs with at least 48 GB unified memory
agentic coding workloads that need long context with less memory pressure

versions.notes: Tuned vLLM nightly recipe retained for reproducibility.
Promotes released vLLM 0.25.0 for the measured 27B dense GB10 lane.

recipes.name: DGX Spark Qwen3.6 Unsloth NVFP4 vLLM
recipes.summary: Curated Qwen3.6 27B dense and 35B-A3B MoE NVFP4 lanes for 128 GB NVIDIA GB10 systems, including the measured scheduler-8 dense configuration.
recommendedFor: NVIDIA DGX Spark / GB10 systems with 128 GB unified memory
users who want the measured local 27B dense or 35B-A3B MoE Qwen3.6 lanes

recipes.name: Linux NVIDIA Qwen3.6 27B NVFP4 vLLM
recipes.summary: CUDA/NVIDIA Qwen3.6 27B NVFP4 lane using vLLM with long context, prefix caching, tool calls, Qwen reasoning, and MTP speculative decoding.
recommendedFor: Linux NVIDIA CUDA machines with at least 96 GB memory
DGX Spark / GB10 class local inference setups
agentic coding workloads that need Qwen reasoning, tool calls, batching, and long context

recipes.name: Linux NVIDIA Qwen3.6 35B-A3B FP8 vLLM
recipes.summary: CUDA/NVIDIA Qwen3.6 35B-A3B MoE lane using vLLM — primary DGX Spark / GB10 agent default for throughput, tools, and long context.
recommendedFor: DGX Spark / GB10 class local inference setups
Linux NVIDIA CUDA machines with at least 96 GB memory
agentic coding with Qwen MoE quality and tool calls

recipes.name: High-memory NSFW image generation
recipes.summary: Opt-in CyberRealistic Pony v18 and Aisha V96 FLUX.2 Klein 9B NSFW image lanes.
recommendedFor: High-memory local systems where users explicitly want adult-content-capable community models

recipes.name: Linux NVIDIA Qwen3.6 27B SGLang
recipes.summary: CUDA/NVIDIA Qwen3.6 27B dense lane using SGLang for agent/tool loops and prefix-cache-heavy sessions on Spark-class hardware.
recommendedFor: DGX Spark / GB10 when agent multi-turn prefix reuse matters
Linux NVIDIA machines preferring SGLang over vLLM for tool loops
